archetypes.name: Heretic
archetypes.desc: - Every model in the army with access to the Armory may select a single item from any Chaos faction, instead of from Imperial factions.

archetypes.name: Iconoclast
archetypes.desc: - Every model in the army with access to the Armory may select a single item from any Xenos faction, instead of from Imperial factions.

legacies.name: Ordo Hereticus
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Ordo Hereticus Armory and Ordo Hereticus Warbands.

legacies.name: Ordo Malleus
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Ordo Malleus Armory and Ordo Malleus Warbands.

legacies.name: Ordo Xenos
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Ordo Xenos Armory and Ordo Xenos Warbands.

legacies.name: Ordo Minoris
legacies.desc: Every character model in the army may select a single item from either the Ordo Hereticus, Malleus or Xenos Armory. Additionally, the army may include a single Ordo Hereticus, Malleus or Xenos Warband.
